subject: unwind head spa could be getting more bookings
body:
Hi Holly,

I found Unwind Head Spa while looking at wellness businesses in Greenwood. Japanese-style head spa is a great niche and your early reviews are strong.

Right now your only web presence is a GlossGenius booking link. When someone searches for head spa near Greenwood, they can't find you.

I'll write your 3 best service descriptions optimized so you show up when people search for head spa and scalp treatments near them. Yours to use however you want.

Want me to send them over?

Eric Lefler
OphidianAI
